steps: Report the loss to the nearest police station (警察局) and obtain a loss report (遗失证明).
Contact your country's embassy or consulate in China immediately to apply for an emergency travel document.
Contact your airline and hotel to inform them of the situation and provide any supporting documents.
Keep digital copies of your passport's main page, visa, and recent entry stamps stored separately.

phrases.english: Can I get a loss report here?
phrases.chinese: 我可以在这里办理遗失证明吗？
phrases.pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ zài zhèlǐ bànlǐ yīshī zhèngmíng ma?

phrases.chinese: 最近的大使馆/领事馆在哪里？

steps: Immediately call your bank's international collect call number to report the loss and freeze your cards.
File a police report if the cards were stolen, as it may be required for insurance claims.
Use your backup payment method (second card or cash) while awaiting replacements.
Monitor your online banking for any unauthorized transactions.

phrases.english: I need to report my credit card lost/stolen.
phrases.chinese: 我需要挂失我的信用卡。
phrases.pinyin: Wǒ xūyào guàshī wǒ de xìnyòngkǎ.

phrases.english: Can I freeze my account now?
phrases.chinese: 我现在可以冻结我的账户吗？
phrases.pinyin: Wǒ xiànzài kěyǐ dòngjié wǒ de zhànghù ma?

steps: Use a computer or another device to log into your iCloud or Google account to remotely lock, locate, or wipe your phone.
Contact your mobile carrier to suspend your service and prevent unauthorized use.
Report to the police if you believe it was stolen, providing the IMEI number if available.
Use your hotel or local business Wi-Fi to communicate via email or messaging apps on borrowed devices.

phrases.pinyin: Wǒ zhǎo bù dào wǒ de shǒujī le.

phrases.chinese: 我可以用一下你们的Wi-Fi吗？
phrases.pinyin: Wǒ kěyǐ yòng yīxià nǐmen de Wi-Fi ma?

steps: Contact the airline directly via their customer service number or airport counter to explain the situation.
Provide your booking reference, full name, and flight details to locate your reservation.
Ask about the policy and procedure for reprinting a lost ticket or issuing a boarding pass.
Arrive at the airport early to allow extra time for resolving the issue at the check-in counter.

phrases.english: I have lost my flight ticket/boarding pass.

phrases.pinyin: Wǒ de yùdìng hào shì ABC123.

phrases.english: Can you reprint my boarding pass?
phrases.chinese: 您可以重新打印我的登机牌吗？
phrases.pinyin: Nín kěyǐ chóngxīn dǎyìn wǒ de dēngjīpái ma?
